title: Dismiss The Confirm Alert
goal: Trigger the confirm alert on the DemoQA alerts page, dismiss it, and stop after the page shows that Cancel was selected.
instruction: Open the DemoQA alerts page, trigger the confirm alert, dismiss it, and stop after the page shows the cancel result.
review_notes: Confirm-alert task on DemoQA using explicit dialog dismissal and DOM-visible cancel-result verification.

steps.explanation: I triggered the confirm alert and dismissed it so the page can show the cancel result.

action.summary: I dismissed the confirm alert and the page now shows that Cancel was selected.

steps.explanation: The cancel result is visible on the page, so I am ending the task.
